name: Chicken Deviled Eggs
recipeIngredient: 3/4 tsp Hot pepper sauce, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut eggs lengthwise in half. Remove yolks and place them in a small bowl.
2. Mash the yolks with a fork. Add chicken, mayonnaise, onion, Dijon mustard, dry mustard, hot sauce, and parsley. Blend well.
3. Stuff egg whites with yolk mixture.
4. Sprinkle tops with paprika for garnish.
5. Cover and refrigerate until serving time.
